violations.text: Per PIC, walk-in freezer is in poor repair. Unit is awaiting part and maintenance. Establishment has adequate freezer space and refrigeration. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

PIC observed not wearing hair restraints while cooking. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
There was no Hot Water Available at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

The walls in the food prep area are constructed of painted cinderblock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Establishment is to cover walls behind working area of prep tables with a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the dish room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Coving shall be installed around hand sink and 3 bay sink in dish room. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023
